problem id: fb184e97
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01100111 -> 01000011
  00101001 -> 10000100
  01010001 -> 00111000
  11011111 -> 10011111
  01101011 -> 10000101
  11110110 -> 00011011
  10001101 -> 10010110
  11010100 -> 00101010

query: 00100001
predicted answer: 00000000
